name: Cheesy Chicken
recipeIngredient: 8 chicken breast, no skin, no bone
recipeInstructions:
1. Dust frozen chicken breasts with seasonings (garlic powder, onion powder, salt, and pepper).
2. Place the seasoned chicken breasts in the crockpot.
3. Mix together the contents of the two canned soups (cream of chicken soup and cheddar cheese soup).
4. Pour the mixed soups over the chicken breasts in the crockpot.
5. Cover the crockpot and cook on low for 8-10 hours, stirring occasionally to ensure even cooking.
